PUPPET_FILE
  PsiPuppetIfStatementImpl(IF_STATEMENT)
    PsiElement(IF)('if')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetConditionalBranchImpl(CONDITIONAL_BRANCH)
      PsiPuppetExpressionRegexImpl(EXPRESSION_REGEX)
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('match_request_method')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(=~)('=~')
        PsiErrorElement:'String' unexpected
          <empty list>
  PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
  PsiPuppetExpressionRelationImpl(EXPRESSION_RELATION)
    PsiPuppetResourceDeclarationImpl(RESOURCE_DECLARATION)
      PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
        PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('String')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetBracedResourceByClassnameContentsBlockImpl(BRACED_RESOURCE_BY_CLASSNAME_CONTENTS_BLOCK)
        PsiElement({)('{')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
        Puppet: RESOURCE_INSTANCE_DECLARATION
          PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(NAME)('validate_re')
          PsiErrorElement:':' or '=>' expected, got '('
            <empty list>
          PsiElement(()('(')
        PsiErrorElement:';' expected, got '$'
          PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('match_request_method')
        PsiElement(,)(',')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''^(put|post|get|head|delete)$'')
        PsiElement())(')')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
        PsiElement(})('}')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiErrorElement:'elsif' unexpected
      PsiElement(ELSIF)('elsif')
  PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
  PsiPuppetExpressionRegexImpl(EXPRESSION_REGEX)
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('match_request_method')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(=~)('=~')
    PsiErrorElement:'Array' unexpected
      <empty list>
  PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
  PsiPuppetResourceDeclarationImpl(RESOURCE_DECLARATION)
    PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Array')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetBracedResourceByClassnameContentsBlockImpl(BRACED_RESOURCE_BY_CLASSNAME_CONTENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      Puppet: RESOURCE_INSTANCE_DECLARATION
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('match_request_method')
        PsiErrorElement:':' or '[' expected, got '.'
          <empty list>
        PsiElement(.)('.')
      PsiErrorElement:';' expected, got 'each'
        PsiElement(NAME)('each')
      PsiElement(DUMMY_BLOCK)
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(|)('|')
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('method')
        PsiElement(|)('|')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement({)('{')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
        PsiElement(NAME)('validate_re')
        PsiElement(()('(')
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('method')
        PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''^(put|post|get|head|delete)$'')
      PsiElement())(')')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiErrorElement:Unknown tokens
    PsiElement(})('}')
